title: Jhulna Re
card_subtitle: Maa ki goad mein dheere dheere — aage peeche, aage peeche
lyrics:
Jhulna re, jhulna re
Dheere dheere jhulna re
Aage peeche, aage peeche
Aankhein band ho jaayein dheere

Maa ki goad mein, jhulna re
Saari raat hai apni
Maa ki goad mein, jhulna re
Neend hai meethi apni

Sham dhali, hawa thandi
Aangan mein deep jale
Bachche ka hai jhula resham
Dheere dheere chale

Maa ki goad mein, jhulna re
Saari raat hai apni
Maa ki goad mein, jhulna re
Neend hai meethi apni

Saans dheere, dil dheere
Jhula bhi ab dheere
Aage peeche, neend mein kheenche
Sapne aaye sapne
lyrics_deva:
झूलना रे, झूलना रे
धीरे धीरे झूलना रे
आगे पीछे, आगे पीछे
आँखें बंद हो जाएँ धीरे

माँ की गोद में, झूलना रे
सारी रात है अपनी
माँ की गोद में, झूलना रे
नींद है मीठी अपनी

शाम ढली, हवा ठंडी
आँगन में दीप जले
बच्चे का है झूला रेशम
धीरे धीरे चले

माँ की गोद में, झूलना रे
सारी रात है अपनी
माँ की गोद में, झूलना रे
नींद है मीठी अपनी

साँस धीरे, दिल धीरे
झूला भी अब धीरे
आगे पीछे, नींद में खींचे
सपने आए सपने

style_prompt: Gentle Hindi rocking lullaby, soft warm female vocal, low register, swaying 6/8 rhythm at 58 BPM, soft santoor pulse underneath like raindrops, tender sarangi answering each line, no vibrato, intimate maternal delivery, even back-and-forth swaying motion in the music itself, minimal instrumentation, soft breath between phrases, traditional Indian classical lullaby feel

character.name: Bachcha
character.identity: a small drowsy Indian toddler being gently rocked in a soft cotton hammock-jhula strung between two pillars in a warm south-Indian courtyard at dusk, eyes half-closed, one tiny hand draped over the edge
character.special: the jhula moves in a slow steady rhythm — aage peeche, aage peeche — exactly the speed of a calm breath
